entities.boy: a boy in a winter hat
entities.pond: a frozen pond with visible ice patterns

scenes.title: The Frozen Pond
scenes.background_prompt: A winter park with a small pond surrounded by bare trees, a wooden railing along the edge, snow-covered ground, and a gray sky. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A winter park under a gray sky. A small round pond is completely frozen over, its surface a sheet of milky white ice with intricate frost patterns radiating like fern fronds from the center. A boy of about ten in a red winter hat with a white pompom, a puffy navy blue jacket, and brown snow boots stands at the wooden railing along the pond's edge, leaning forward and peering down at the ice with fascination. He presses one mittened hand against the railing. Bare trees with snow-dusted branches surround the pond. The ground is covered in a thin layer of fresh white snow with footprints leading to where the boy stands. A park bench nearby has a small pile of snow on its seat.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy at the wooden railing along the pond's edge, standing and leaning forward, peering at the ice with one mittened hand on the railing. Place pond as completely frozen, milky white ice with intricate frost fern patterns.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the far left, a large, thick brown tree with bare, snow-dusted branches rises from a mound of snow and clumps of tall, dry brown grass. Moving right across the foreground, small green clover-like plants and thin blades of grass emerge from the deep white snow. In the center of the scene, a frozen pond is visible, its surface covered in intricate, white frost patterns shaped like stars and ferns. To the right of the pond, a boy stands on a snow-covered path, leaning his gloved hands on a rustic wooden railing made of horizontal logs and vertical posts. The boy has short black hair, rosy cheeks, and is wearing a green and yellow striped knit hat with a yellow pom-pom, a light blue puffer jacket, dark blue pants, green gloves, and brown boots. He is looking down toward the pond. Behind the boy on the far right, there are more clumps of dry brown grass, small dried tan flowers, and a large green bush partially covered in snow. In the midground, the snow-covered terrain transitions into rolling hills populated by many bare, brown trees and a small cluster of dark green evergreens on the left side. The background consists of more distant, snow-covered hills under a pale blue sky containing several soft, white, puffy clouds. The entire scene is set in a winter landscape during the daytime.
